title: GET /notes — 200 response item
description: The frozen read contract between notes-api (provider) and its consumers, governed by system/SYS-006 and enforced per SYS-018. Consumers read a SUBSET of these fields, so ADDING a field is backward-compatible and this schema is intentionally open. REMOVING or RENAMING a field a consumer reads is breaking, and because consumers parse defensively it fails silently rather than loudly — which is why it is checked in CI rather than trusted.
